_note: yes_ask+no_ask = 0.90 (gross 10%) — Kalshi's real taker fee is 0.07*p*(1-p) per contract (~3.47% total for a 0.45/0.45 pair, not the old flat-14% approximation), clearing both fees+slippage and the Kelly formula's ~5.26% breakeven threshold (p=0.95, q=0.05) at a net of ~6.2%. Uses ASK prices, the real executable buy cost — see DECISIONS.md Session 26 (2026-07-13) on why yes_bid/no_bid must not be used here, and on the real fee formula.
